description: Product Description ENJOY PEACEFUL HEAVENLY SLEEP PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Sleep in blissful comfort. CAROLINE SHATUIK Premium Mattress Protector Cover provides you with a peaceful heavenly sleeping experience. Our Mattress protector is made with fluffier polyester hollow fiber to give you cozy feel and restful night sleep. Superior diamond stitching pattern design prevent polyester filling from clumping. Hypoallergenic filling keep you safe from allergens. keep your mattress looking newer and feeling fresher for longer with our cozy and light mattress protector. It's prefect for adding an extra layer of protection to your bedding. Tired of trying poor Quality material? Feel uncomfortable and rustle noise because of poor-quality mattress protector? What makes CAROLINE SHATUIK Different? Superior Quality material and diamond stitching pattern which makes our mattress protector breathable, Non - Noisy & Anti - Allergy Available in 16 Inch/40 cm , 12 Inches/30 cm Deep & Extra Deep Pocket - fit mattresses according to your mattress height Available in All Sizes. Single Mattress Protector (Width 90 x Length 190 + 30 cm Deep Skirt) Queen/small Double/4ft (Width122 x Length190 +30 cm Deep Skirt) Extra Deep Double Mattress Protector (Width137 x Length190 +40cm Deep Skirt) Extra Deep King Size Mattress Protector (Width 152 x Length 200 + 40cm Deep Skirt) Extra Deep Super King Mattress Protectors (Width 182 x Length 200 + 40 cm Deep Skirt) Available In Different sizes Extra Deep Fitted Skirt 40cm 1.Extra deep pocket will stretch up to 16 inches /40cm deep. Deep Fitted Skirt 30Cm 2.Deep pocket will stretch up to 12 inches /30cm inch deep. 360 Degree Elasticated Skirt Strong Grip 360 Degree Elasticated breathable strong fabric skirt for a snug fit. No more sliding and slipping. Easy Care Washing Machine Washable: Machine-wash the mattress protector using normal household detergents. Do not use bleach. Drying: Tumble dry on low heat together with other clothing. Do not iron and do not dry clean. 360 DEGREE STRONG ELASTIC GRIP FOR A SNUG FIT STRETCHABLE STRONG SKIRT FABRIC Smooth Grip Skirt System fits mattresses up to 12 or 16 inches deep mattress. Our Smooth-Grip skirt works like a fitted sheet, wrapping right round your mattress and would not slip and slide. We have used superior Quality Skirt Fabric which is not only breathable but also highly stretchable to fit your mattress size.
